text: Jalen Brunson won 7 trophies this year: NBA Cup, NBA Cup MVP, Shooting Stars, Eastern Conference Finals trophy, Eastern Conference MVP, NBA Championship, and Finals MVP. Crazy when you see it all listed out. What an amazing year for the Captain Jalen Brunson.

text: Bro lost to the Pacers in 2025 and took it personally.

text: Shooting Stars is a meme, but it's a great haul for the King of NY.

notes: Borderline between reaction and hot_take. I chose hot_take because it makes an evaluative claim about which trophies matter without much support.

text: There is a perception that there is a transitive linear order between teams. Knicks defeated SAS and SAS defeated OKC, therefore NYK should defeat OKC. This is not necessarily the case. It is all about matchups. OKC could pose a totally different set of challenges to the Knicks offense.

text: I actively rooted for SAS in the conference finals because I legitimately believed they were a better matchup for the Knicks. I still believe OKC would have given us a tougher series.
label: analysis

text: The reason people are being so much more harsh to SAS than OKC is because SAS lost more recently. People already had these conversations about OKC, but moved on because the Finals started.
label: analysis

text: After the WCF, everyone was saying the Spurs were set for a dynasty. Now, because they lost to a team that was basically built to counter them at the end of a long season, people are hyper-fixating on the weaknesses of the team.
label: analysis

text: Their weaknesses basically amount to inexperience and lack of depth. Those are two of the easiest issues to fix for next season because the young guys can develop or they can add one or two veterans.
label: analysis

text: I think people are underestimating the power of the NYC market. Their NYC machine was going to go after whoever played the Knicks, and a lot of national neutral sports people are NYC based and lost their ability to stay truly neutral in their coverage.
label: analysis
notes: Borderline with hot_take. I chose analysis because it gives a specific media-market explanation for the narrative.
